title: Room temperature setpoint guide
summary: Recommended setpoints: Cooling 26-28°C, Dry 21-24°C, Heating 22-24°C, Fan no setting.

title: Sleep timer operation
summary: Sleep timer stops unit after set time (1-10 hours). Once set, unit stops at each set time.
evidence_quote:
睡眠定时器
当设定的时间已到时，本机停止运转。可进行10种设定，从“一小时后关闭”到“10小时后关闭”。本机在到达设定时间时停止。

title: Off timer operation
summary: Off timer stops unit at set time. Setting is effective once.
evidence_quote:
关机定时器
本机在设定时间停止运转。您一次只能设定一个时间。

title: On timer operation
summary: On timer starts unit at set time with optional temperature. Setting is effective once.
evidence_quote:
开机定时器
本机在设定时间开始运转。您可以同时设定温度。您一次只能设定一个时间。

title: Weekly timer operation
summary: Weekly timer allows up to four on/off schedules per day, repeating weekly.
evidence_quote:
每周定时器
一周内的每天定时器最多可以运转四次（开机定时器/关机定时器）。每周定时器一旦设定，本机将在每周执行相同的运转方式。

title: Operating range for standard units
summary: Cooling: indoor 21-32°C, outdoor -15 to 43°C; Heating: indoor ~27°C or lower, outdoor -20 to 21°C; Humidity ≤80%.
evidence_quote:
制冷运转
室温大约21到32°C
室外温度大约-15到43°C
制热运转
室温大约27°C或更低
室外温度大约-20到21°C
室内湿度大约80%或更低

title: Operating range for FDU-F
summary: FDU-F cooling: outdoor -10 to 24°C DB; heating: outdoor 20 to 40°C DB (32°C WB).
evidence_quote:
制冷运转
室外空气温度 -10 ~ 24 °C 干球
制热运转
室外空气温度 20 ~ 40°C (32 °C 湿球) 干球

title: Filter cleaning signal reset
summary: When FILTER CLEANING is displayed, clean filter and press RESET button to clear signal.
evidence_quote: 当累积运转时间达到为了通知应该清洁而设定的小时数时，显示“FILTER CLEANING”。清洁后按一下 RESET按钮。累积运转小时数被重新设定，且“FILTER CLEANING”信息消失。

title: Check indicator flashing red
summary: When check indicator flashes red, unit stops and error code is displayed.
evidence_quote: 当检查指示灯（红色）闪烁时，空调器将停止。同时，检查指示灯闪烁红色且错误代码显示在开机定时器显示区域。

title: Default settings after power on
summary: First operation after power on: Auto mode cooling, setpoint 23°C, fan speed auto, louver horizontal.
evidence_quote: 当您打开电源后第一次开始操作时，本机开始按照下列方式运转。对于自动模式：自动制冷，非自动模式：制冷，设定温度23°C，风速自动，叶片位置水平。
